# LinkyCal API
> Form & Scheduling infrastructure. API-first.

## Endpoints
- GET /api/v1/availability/:projectSlug - Check available time slots
- POST /api/v1/bookings - Create a booking
- POST /api/v1/forms/:projectSlug/:formSlug/responses - Start a form response
- POST /api/v1/forms/:projectSlug/:formSlug/responses/:responseId/uploads - Upload a file for a file field
- PATCH /api/v1/forms/:projectSlug/:formSlug/responses/:responseId/steps/:stepIndex - Submit a form step
- GET /api/widget/form/:projectSlug/:formSlug/config - Get a form's config
- POST /api/public/forms/:projectSlug/:formSlug/submit - Submit a native HTML form

## Auth
Bearer token via API key: Authorization: Bearer lc_live_...

## MCP
Streamable HTTP server for AI agents: https://linkycal.com/api/mcp

## Docs
/docs
